title: We Built This City
why_this_song: We Built This City by Starship (1985) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 47 times; first heard in: "We built this city"
Appears 43 times; first heard in: "We built this city"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "We built this city on rock and roll"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "We built this city on rock and roll"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Say you don't know me or recognize my face"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "built" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "built" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "city" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "city" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Who counts the money underneath the bar?

exercises.prompt_en: "We Built This City" was released in 1985. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "We Built This City" foi lançada em 1985. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "We Built This City" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "We Built This City" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
